.editorconfig.general_idea: Update .editorconfig to use modern JHipster 6+ file glob patterns and indentation settings.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.

package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to version 14.15.0 or higher to align with JDK 11 era tooling standards.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern build tools and dependencies required for the new JHipster version, causing installation or runtime failures.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build scripts with Angular CLI and Webpack-based scripts.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is removed from dependencies; the old scripts would fail because the 'grunt' command is no longer available.

package.json.general_idea: Remove legacy Grunt and related dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: These packages are no longer used and may conflict with the new Angular/Webpack ecosystem or contain security vulnerabilities.
The application has migrated from a legacy frontend stack to Angular, requiring these core libraries to compile and run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and build tooling dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: Required to execute the new build scripts (ng build, ng serve) which replace the old Grunt tasks.
The old Karma/Jasmine setup is replaced by Jest and Protractor; old tests would fail to run without these new tools.

package.json.general_idea: Add configuration variables for backend port and packaging.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-failsafe-plugin configuration to support integration tests with Spring Boot repackaging.
Add sonar-maven-plugin to plugin management for code quality analysis.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin to plugin management with repackage goal and configuration.
Replace 'dev' profile with 'no-liquibase' profile to disable Liquibase migrations.
Replace 'fast' profile with 'api-docs' profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add 'tls' profile to enable TLS configuration.
Add 'webpack' profile to manage frontend build with webpack.
Add 'dev' profile with Undertow, devtools, and H2 dependencies.
Switch embedded server from Tomcat to Undertow in 'prod' profile.
Remove yeoman-maven-plugin from 'prod' profile build plugins.
Update maven-clean-plugin configuration to clean target/classes/static/ instead of webapp/dist.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin build-info goal to 'prod' profile.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to 'prod' profile for webpack build.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to 'prod' profile build plugins.
Add 'war' profile to support WAR file generation.
Add 'IDE' profile with MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator dependencies.
Add 'eclipse' profile with m2e lifecycle mapping configuration.
Add 'e2e' profile for end-to-end testing configuration.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x datasource configuration to Spring Boot 2.x HikariCP format.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed support for `spring.datasource.dataSourceClassName` and `spring.datasource.databaseName`/`serverName` for H2; it requires `spring.datasource.type` and standard JDBC URL properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
datasource:
        dataSourceClassName: org.h2.jdbcx.JdbcDataSource
        url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipster;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1
        databaseName: 
        serverName: 
        username: 
        password:
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
datasource:
    type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipsterhazelcastsampleapplication;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE
    username: jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication
    password:
    hikari:
      poolName: Hikari
      auto-commit: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update JPA Hibernate properties to Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and remove deprecated settings.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames `spring.jpa.hibernate.naming-strategy` to `spring.jpa.hibernate.naming.physical-strategy` (or removes it in favor of default) and changes `spring.jpa.database` to `spring.jpa.database-platform`; old properties cause binding errors or are ignored.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
jpa:
        database-platform: com.mycompany.myapp.domain.util.FixedH2Dialect
        database: H2
        openInView: false
        show_sql: true
        generate-ddl: false
        hibernate:
            ddl-auto: none
            naming-strategy: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Liquibase configuration from root level to Spring Boot 2.x nested `spring.liquibase` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x requires Liquibase properties to be under `spring.liquibase`; root-level `liquibase:` properties are no longer bound automatically.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
liquibase:
    # Remove 'faker' if you do not want the sample data to be loaded automatically
    contexts: dev, faker

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot 1.x specific metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite) which is replaced by Micrometer in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `spring.metrics` namespace for Spark/Graphite; these properties are invalid and may cause binding failures or be ignored, requiring migration to Micrometer if needed.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 9999
    graphite:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 2003
        prefix: jhipster

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf configuration to remove deprecated `mode: XHTML` setting.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x / Thymeleaf 3.x defaults to HTML5 mode; `mode: XHTML` is deprecated/removed and may cause startup errors or warnings.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update message cache duration property to ISO 8601 duration format required by Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x `spring.messages.cache-duration` expects a Duration (e.g., PT1S) instead of seconds integer; old format causes binding failure.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
messages:
    cache-duration: PT1S # 1 second, see the ISO 8601 standard

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x DevTools configuration for restart and livereload.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-exclude: static/**,.h2.server.properties
    livereload:
      enabled: false # we use Webpack dev server + BrowserSync for livereload

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Jackson serialization configuration for pretty printing in dev profile.
Add H2 console configuration explicitly disabled in dev profile.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add JHipster specific configuration properties (cache, CORS, security, logging).
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
jhipster:
  cache: # Cache configuration
    hazelcast: # Hazelcast distributed cache
      time-to-live-seconds: 3600
      backup-count: 1
  # CORS is only enabled by default with the "dev" profile, so BrowserSync can access the API
  cors:
    allowed-origins: '*'
    allowed-methods: '*'
    allowed-headers: '*'
    exposed-headers: 'Link,X-Total-Count'
    allow-credentials: true
    max-age: 1800
  security:
    remember-me:
      # security key (this key should be unique for your application, and kept secret)
      key: f0186c13d2417f4fa9532017dc5e02300d6c232d
  mail: # specific JHipster mail property, for standard properties see MailProperties
    base-url: http://127.0.0.1:8080
  logging:
    use-json-format: false # By default, logs are not in Json format
    logstash: # Forward logs to logstash over a socket, used by LoggingConfiguration
      enabled: false
      host: localhost
      port: 5000
      queue-size: 512

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add logging level configuration for dev profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    io.github.jhipster.sample: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add profile include configuration for api-docs.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
profiles:
    active: dev
    include:
      - api-docs
      # Uncomment to activate TLS for the dev profile
      #- tls

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Remove old cache configuration block replaced by JHipster specific properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
cache:
    timeToLiveSeconds: 3600
    hazelcast:
        debug: true
        stickySession: false
        backupCount: 1

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions, and Spring Boot 2.x defaults to HikariCP; using the old class causes runtime initialization failures or classpath errors.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update MySQL JDBC URL to include timezone and SSL parameters required by newer MySQL Connector/J.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Newer MySQL Connector/J versions (8.0+) require explicit serverTimezone and useSSL settings; omitting them causes runtime exceptions or connection failures due to strict timezone handling and SSL defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hibernate naming strategy with standard JPA configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; retaining it causes a ClassNotFoundException at startup.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate metrics configuration from Spring Boot 1.x metrics to Spring Boot 2.x Micrometer management properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'metrics' namespace and Spark/Graphite exporters were removed in Spring Boot 2.x; using them causes configuration binding errors or missing bean exceptions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Liquibase configuration property from 'context' to 'contexts' to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renamed the Liquibase context property to 'contexts'; using the old 'context' key results in the property being ignored, potentially causing schema update failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add JHipster-specific configuration properties for cache, security, and mail.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
jhipster:
  http:
    cache:
      timeToLiveInDays: 1461
  cache:
    hazelcast:
      time-to-live-seconds: 3600

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enable server compression and graceful shutdown in production profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
server:
  port: 8080
  shutdown: graceful
  compression:
    enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Disable Spring Boot DevTools in production profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: false
    livereload:
      enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update logging levels for JHipster and application packages.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: INFO
    tech.jhipster: INFO
    io.github.jhipster.sample: INFO

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add Thymeleaf cache configuration for production.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x management endpoint configuration to Spring Boot 2.x structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties; using them causes configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration from custom `async` namespace to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task.execution` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for `ThreadPoolTaskExecutor` binds to `spring.task.execution`, not a custom `async` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-hazelcast-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom `mail` namespace to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for JavaMailSender binds to `spring.mail`, not a custom `mail` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration from custom `swagger` namespace to JHipster-specific `jhipster.api-docs` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The custom `swagger` namespace is no longer recognized by the updated JHipster configuration properties class.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes default behaviors for JPA repositories and Hibernate; explicit configuration is required to maintain performance and compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x server servlet session configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x moves session configuration under `server.servlet.session`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add JHipster specific application properties for client app name and info.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6.x expects these properties for frontend integration and info endpoint.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x metrics and health probe configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x introduces new metrics backends (Micrometer) and Kubernetes-style health probes.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
  health:
    group:
      liveness:
        include: livenessState
      readiness:
        include: readinessState,datasource
    probes:
      enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x scheduling task configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for `ThreadPoolTaskScheduler` binds to `spring.task.scheduling`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    scheduling:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-hazelcast-sample-application-scheduling-
      pool:
        size: 2

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Thymeleaf and output configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting Thymeleaf mode and ANSI output for consistency in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  thymeleaf:
    mode: HTML
  output:
    ansi:
      console-available: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x info endpoint configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x exposes info via management endpoints; configuration is needed to control ribbon display.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x JMX and bean overriding configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x disables JMX by default and restricts bean overriding; explicit configuration is needed if required.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jmx:
    enabled: false
  main:
    allow-bean-definition-overriding: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate naming strategy configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses different default naming strategies; explicit configuration ensures compatibility with existing database schemas.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: none
      naming:
        physical-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringPhysicalNamingStrategy
        implicit-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringImplicitNamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hazelcast cache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6.x uses Hazelcast for caching; configuration is needed to enable it.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    properties:
      hibernate.cache.region.factory_class: com.hazelcast.hibernate.HazelcastCacheRegionFactory
      hibernate.cache.use_minimal_puts: true
      hibernate.cache.hazelcast.instance_name: jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication
      hibernate.cache.hazelcast.use_lite_member: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x message source configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting message basename for internationalization.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x application name configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses `spring.application.name` for various purposes including metrics and logging.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x profile active configuration placeholder.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Maven filters replace this placeholder with the active profile during build.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x git info configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x exposes git info via management endpoints; configuration is needed to enable it.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x health endpoint roles configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x secures management endpoints; configuration is needed to restrict access to admin roles.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x JHipster metrics endpoint configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6.x exposes custom metrics via management endpoints; configuration is needed to enable it.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x mail health check configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x includes mail health checks; configuration is needed to disable it if mail is not configured.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x metrics enable configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses Micrometer; configuration is needed to enable specific metrics.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    enable:
      http: true
      jvm: true
      logback: true
      process: true
      system: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x metrics distribution configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses Micrometer; configuration is needed to enable histogram and percentile metrics.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    distribution:
      percentiles-histogram:
        all: true
      percentiles:
        all: 0, 0.5, 0.75, 0.95, 0.99, 1.0

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x metrics tags configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses Micrometer; configuration is needed to add application name tag to metrics.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x metrics web request autotime configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses Micrometer; configuration is needed to enable automatic timing of web requests.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    web:
      server:
        request:
          autotime:
            enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate batch size configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting batch size for improved performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate order inserts/updates configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting order inserts/updates for improved performance.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    properties:
      hibernate.order_inserts: true
      hibernate.order_updates: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate query fail on pagination over collection fetch configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting query fail on pagination over collection fetch for improved performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate query in clause parameter padding configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting query in clause parameter padding for improved performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate cache use second level cache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting cache use second level cache for improved performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate cache use query cache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting cache use query cache for improved performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate generate statistics configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting generate statistics for improved performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate connection provider disables autocommit configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting connection provider disables autocommit for improved performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate ID new generator mappings configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting ID new generator mappings for compatibility with newer Hibernate versions.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Hibernate JDBC time zone configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting JDBC time zone for compatibility with newer Hibernate versions.
